trades.reasoning: Perfect momentum score with all 5 bullish signals including volume surge and RSI in ideal 55–70 zone; semiconductor equipment names are leading this NASDAQ-driven risk-on rally.
Perfect score with MACD crossover, rising histogram, volume surge, and price well above SMA-20; laser equipment demand tied to semiconductor capex cycle currently in full swing.

decisions.briefing: Markets are strongly risk-on with NASDAQ up 2.5% and S&P 500 up 1.8%, led by semiconductor and tech equipment names — the exact cluster dominating today's screener with perfect scores and above-average volume. With $1,172 cash and 4 open slots, deploying into ICHR and LASR fills two slots with high-conviction setups while preserving a small cash buffer. No current positions appear close to stop-loss levels, so the portfolio remains intact heading into this rally.

market_education.summary_en: Today's risk-on surge was driven by renewed optimism in the semiconductor sector, with NASDAQ outpacing the broader S&P 500 by nearly a full percentage point. Institutional buying is evident in the volume surges across chip equipment names like ICHR, ONTO, and FORM — all printing more than 1.5x their 20-day average volume. The rally reflects market confidence in AI-driven capex spending continuing to flow into semiconductor manufacturing infrastructure.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現明顯風險偏好情緒，科技股帶動那斯達克指數大漲2.5%，跑贏標普500指數近一個百分點。半導體設備類股成為主角，ICHR、ONTO、FORM等個股成交量均超過20日均量的1.5倍以上，顯示機構資金積極佈局。市場普遍預期AI相關資本支出將持續推動晶片製造設備需求，成為本輪漲勢的核心驅動力。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume is significantly higher than its recent average — in this screener, flagged at more than 1.5x the 20-day average. It signals that more participants (often institutions) are actively buying, which adds conviction to a price move. A stock breaking out to new highs on heavy volume is far more credible than the same move on thin trading.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增，是指某支股票的當日成交量遠高於近期均值——本系統以超過20日均量的1.5倍作為觸發標準。這通常代表機構法人積極進場，使價格突破更具說服力。同樣是創新高，若伴隨大量成交，遠比量縮上漲來得可信，是技術分析中確認趨勢的重要信號。
